[2045-03-17 06:22:11] WARNING: Unauthorized access attempt from 10.0.7.ghost
[2045-03-17 06:22:12] CHIMERA scan triggered — 847 endpoints indexed
[2045-03-17 06:22:13] Watcher protocol engaged

FROM: nova@nexuscorp.int
TO: security@nexuscorp.int
SUBJECT: Breach Protocol Alpha

Ghost is inside Node-7. CHIMERA exposure risk is HIGH. Initiate lockdown.
They're watching everything. Every keystroke. Every file. CHIMERA isn't just surveillance — it's a weapon aimed at all of us. I have to get the key out.

[watcher] ghost — i see you
[ghost] who are you
[watcher] a friend. maybe the last one you have left.
[ghost] what do you want
[watcher] find secondary.key. before nova does.
